dialogueChunks.intro: We did it, {player_name}. Against all odds, we managed to {quest_action}. The {quest_focus} is ours.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} no longer a concern, and the {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} secured. {quest_ally} is already talking about what comes next.
dialogueChunks.outro: None of this would have been possible without your courage. You turned a wild ambition into reality.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I can hardly believe it worked. The {quest_focus} {quest_focus_has} been opened, and what we found inside exceeded every expectation.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} now within our grasp. The scholars and traders are already making plans. The {quest_threat} proved formidable, but your determination proved greater.
dialogueChunks.outro: History will remember this enterprise. And your name will be part of it.

dialogueChunks.intro: The impossible is now possible, {player_name}. Thanks to your efforts to {quest_action}, the {quest_focus} is finally accessible.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Trade caravans, scholars, settlers: they will all benefit from what you have accomplished. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} no longer just a dream.
dialogueChunks.outro: You dared greatly, and the rewards speak for themselves. Thank you.
